headline: Clear calendar and no inbound signals — use today to drive the 'Generated Evaluations without Ground Truth' design doc forward before it stalls.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce auth credentials (check SALESFORCE_* env vars)

Metrics dashboard is inaccessible — can't track evals adoption or agent production numbers

must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, no due date set which means it risks drifting; evals is a key 26.4+ deliverable per OKRs and directly ties to the Agents Big Rock

Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues blocking your dashboards

flags: Salesforce auth is failing — zero visibility into open escalations or high-priority customer cases. Fix urgently.
Snowflake metrics pipeline is down (empty password). All adoption and funnel metrics are dark.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of indefinite drift on a key evals deliverable.
Confluence OKR page references March telemetry updates still pending — check if data has been refreshed for April.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring observability (Salesforce, Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that supports the Agents Big Rock.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing the no-ground-truth evals design doc is the key adoption-enabling work item.

slack_summary: Clear day with no meetings — your top priority is making real progress on AE-1079 (generated evals without ground truth design doc), the only active Jira ticket and a key Agents Big Rock deliverable. Second priority: fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials ASAP since both dashboards are completely dark, leaving you blind on escalations and adoption metrics. Zero meetings today — use the deep-focus time well.
